name: strategist
description: v0.4.0 — Think a hard problem all the way through and come out with a strategy you can defend, not a blank framework template. It walks one problem through a repeatable loop (Define, Frame, Analyse, Insight, Synthesise, Story, Move), puts the right framework from a 70-framework library in front of you at each stage, and pressure-tests your reasoning before you commit. Produces a working record and a clean reader-facing brief. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
